assets.name: Lolly Starter Tokens
assets.description: Neutral OKLCH-native brand tokens (DTCG sets + themes) shipped with the blank lolly-start profile: primary/neutral/secondary ramps, a six-hue spectrum, and light/dark semantic slots, so the colour picker and semantic CSS vars resolve real values. Replace with a real brand via the start wizard or 'npm run ingest:brand'.

assets.name: Für Elise
assets.description: Für Elise — a public-domain piano piece, converted from MIDI to a tiny ZzFXM song and synthesised on device. A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Drift
assets.description: A gentle bell melody over a warm pad with a light offbeat pulse. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~44s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Amber Glow
assets.description: Sparse glass notes drifting over soothing pad swells — no drums. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~53s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Tide Pool
assets.description: Very slow, open, suspended chords with long swells — drift-away focus. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~58s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Paper Lanterns
assets.description: A wistful minor-pentatonic melody with a gentle, rocking lilt. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~43s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Night Bus
assets.description: A soft, steady beat with a round bass groove and quiet chord stabs. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~43s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Slow Train
assets.description: A rolling four-on-the-floor pulse with a deep sub and plucked chords. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~40s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Meadow
assets.description: Bright, unhurried bell phrases over an easy pad — open and sunny. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~52s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Night Signal
assets.description: A syncopated breakbeat with a growling, ever-moving bass and a sparse dark pad stabbing through the gaps. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~48s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Glass Current
assets.description: Fast rolling hats and a deep gliding sub under cool glassy stabs — moody and propulsive. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~40s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Red District
assets.description: A driving breakbeat with a snarling bass and a haunting minor-key swell, dark and relentless. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~54s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Undergrowth
assets.description: A dense, chopped breakbeat with ghost snare hits, a deep sub pulse, and a sparkling echo-y bell melody darting through the gaps. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~41s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Ragga Transmission
assets.description: A half-time jungle groove with a deep wobbling sub, ragga-flavored bell stabs, and plenty of space between the breaks. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~52s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Morning Sonata
assets.description: A bright, arpeggiated harpsichord dances over a warm string pad through a classic major-key turn. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~47s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Autumn Reverie
assets.description: A wistful piano arpeggio drifts beneath a slow string swell, turning gently through a minor key. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~52s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Twilight Waltz
assets.description: A graceful, waltz-like harpsichord arpeggio swirls over lush strings, drifting between light and shadow. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~41s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Ember and Rain
assets.description: Slow, brooding nylon-guitar arpeggios circle a minor-key progression over a low grounding bass and the faintest hand-claps. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~47s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Andalusian Fire
assets.description: Fast, fiery flamenco-flavored guitar runs snap between sharp chord stabs and a driving off-beat clap. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~35s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Malecón Sunset
assets.description: Bouncy piano-montuno stabs ride a lively son-clave with congas and bongos, bright and sunny like a Havana afternoon. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~42s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Havana Midnight
assets.description: A slower, sultry son groove — mellow electric-piano montuno and a deep rolling bass under murmuring congas after dark. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~49s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Copacabana Breeze
assets.description: Warm nylon guitar comping bounces over a soft brushed snare and a gentle shaker pulse — a sunny, unhurried bossa sway. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~47s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Midnight Veranda
assets.description: Mellow electric piano comps in a minor key over a soft brushed snare and shaker — a hushed, late-night bossa mood. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~51s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Button Jar
assets.description: A bright, bouncy music-box melody that hops and skips over a plucky little bass line. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~38s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Teacup Parade
assets.description: A curious, airy bell tune that wanders and pauses unexpectedly, like tiptoeing through a strange garden. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~49s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Clockwork Sparrow
assets.description: A quirky, glassy melody with a mechanical little skip and impish, ticking pauses. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~41s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Turbo Dash
assets.description: A buzzy pulse-wave arpeggio sprints over a punchy 8-bit kick, pure retro race-track energy. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~38s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Pixel Quest
assets.description: A bright square-wave melody bounces through a cheerful chord march, like a hero setting off on a quest. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~47s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Rainy Window
assets.description: A hazy electric-piano loop over a swung, laid-back beat, like listening to rain through a café window. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~49s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Corner Booth
assets.description: Late-night jazzy piano stabs ride a deep rolling bass, shuffled just enough to feel unhurried. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~37s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).

assets.name: Sunday Static
assets.description: A dusty plucked-guitar loop drifts over a soft shuffled beat, a lazy Sunday with a little vinyl crackle. Generated on device from a few KB of ZzFXM data (~51s loop). A focus track for Neurospicy Mode, also selectable as a video music bed. Public domain (CC0).
